18 class Range
19 {
20 public:
21 
22  Range():
23  m_begin(0),
24  m_end(0) {}
25 
26  Range(Arcane::Integer begin, Arcane::Integer end):
27  m_begin(begin),
28  m_end(end) {}
29 
30  Arcane::Integer begin() const { return m_begin; }
31  Arcane::Integer end() const { return m_end; }
32 
33  Arcane::Integer size() const { return m_end - m_begin; }
34 
35 public:
36 
37  Arcane::Integer m_begin;
38  Arcane::Integer m_end;
39 };
40 
41 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
42 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
43 
44 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
45
